title: Dedsafio Utils
description: Utilities to recreate the dedsafio in minecraft
body:
# 🥭 **Dedsafío Utils**

Plugin inspired by the Minecraft series by YouTuber and streamer **Ded** ([@dedrevil](https://www.youtube.com/c/Mrdedreviil)), has been created by and for fans looking to **re-live** and **explore** the Dedsafío universe in a unique way.

While **not an exact copy of the series**, this plugin offers a number of mechanics designed for a fun experience. Over time, we expect the plugin to evolve along with players and the fan community.

## 🛠️ **Current Plugin Features**

### 🧰 **Portable Anvils** **Portable Anvils**
- Fix your gear on the go - portable anvils are ideal for adventurers!

### ⏲️ **Timer System**
- Set custom timers for events on the server. Control and manage times for specific activities or challenges with ease.

### 💀 **Death System**
- Upon death, players will see a death animation. Depending on the configuration, the system may ban the player upon death.

### 🎨 **Roulette System**
- Customizable roulette with all available colors. Allows to configure roulette wheels of different versions (mini or large) and in multiple screen positions. Can also be adjusted to select specific players.

### ⏳ **Server Time Control System**.
- Set a specific time for server opening and closing. Five minutes before the server closes, a timer will be triggered notifying players of its impending closure.

### 📅 **Automatic Events**.
- Sending messages to the server every time a player joins or leaves. In addition, the plugin will notify when a player uses a totem.

### 🎒 Ender Bag Extra space for your adventures.
- Extra space for your adventures - store your stuff in magical ender backpacks and carry everything you need!

## 🚀 **Information**

🌐 **Have ideas or feedback** Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/9Db8AmyFSD) to share your experiences and help shape future mod updates.
